message: Ouvi o som da porta que dá acesso ao edifício A ao abrir-se.
Quando olhei para o lado, vi uma menina caminhando em minha direção.
Era a garota que conheci ontem. Takashima Zakuro-san, não é?

name: Zakuro
message: "Olá."

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, oi."

name: Zakuro
message: "Você se importaria se eu me sentasse ao seu lado?"

name: Yuki
message: "Claro, por que não?"
Não era como se fosse o meu telhado. Ela não precisava realmente de pedir permissão.
É verdade que teria sido um pouco estranho se ela se tivesse sentado ao meu lado sem dizer nada.

name: Zakuro
message: "Bem, então, com licença."
Takashima-san alisou a saia com uma mão enquanto se sentava lentamente ao meu lado.

name: Yuki
message: "Estou surpresa que você conheça este lugar."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hã? O que você quer dizer?"

name: Yuki
message: "Bem, nunca vi mais ninguém aqui em cima. Ninguém conhece este lugar."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, eu sei disso porque olhei pela janela e vi você aqui em cima, sozinha em um oceano azul."

name: Yuki
message: "Porque você me viu aqui em cima?"

name: Zakuro
message: "E pensei que também poderia participar e dividir disso."

name: Yuki
message: "D-Dividir? Do que você está falando? Não tenho comida nem nada, se é isso que você quer."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eu me referia ao céu. Você não deveria ficar com isso só para você em um dia tão bonito."

name: Yuki
message: "O céu?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Sim...
Digamos que você precisa compartilhar o céu."

name: Yuki
message: "Calma aí. Isso não faz sentido. Quer dizer, o céu não pertence a ninguém."

name: Zakuro
message: "Não pertence?"

name: Yuki
message: "Por favor, não me olhe como se eu tivesse dito algo estranho. Não há como alguém possuir algo assim. Bem, talvez se estivéssemos falando sobre uma violação do espaço aéreo ou algo assim, mas isso é diferente."

name: Zakuro
message: "É verdade. Se você diz, talvez seja verdade."

name: Yuki
message: "Não, na verdade não importa o que eu digo."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hum, deixando isso de lado, parece que você está lendo alguma coisa."
A Sra. Takashima olhou para o livro que eu estava segurando.

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, hum... É só isso."
Mostrei a ela a capa.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, isso é
Cyrano de Bergerac? Isso explica tudo, então."

name: Yuki
message: "Hã? Explica o quê?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eu estava me perguntando por que você estava lendo um livro quando o céu está tão bonito, mas se é Cyrano, eu entendo."
Takashima-san olhou para o céu. Seus lábios se moveram apenas levemente enquanto ela falava.

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh! Temos os bolsos cheios. Nossas amadas, fantasmas de nossos cérebros. Fantasias de sonhos transformadas em bolhas de sabão!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Venha! Pegue, e transforme palavras de amor fingidas em verdadeiras."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eu suspirava e gemia de forma aleatória; Chame todos esses pombinhos apaixonados que andam por aí de volta para o ninho."

name: Zakuro
message: "Venha! Pegue. Você verá que eu me escondia nessas linhas escritas, Tanto mais eloquente quanto menos sincero!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Pegue isto e dê um fim a isso!"
Essa foi uma passagem do livro que eu estava lendo, Cyrano de Bergerac.
O verdadeiro Cyrano de Bergerac era francês. Diziam que ele era um mestre da esgrima, escritor, filósofo e cientista.
O que eu estava lendo era a peça que Edmond Rostand escreveu baseada na vida real de Cyrano, Cyrano de Bergerac.
Mas nunca imaginei que alguém nesta escola fosse capaz de recitar Cyrano de memória.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ele sempre sonhou com o Mundo Lunar, não é verdade?"
Ela falava dele como se fosse um amigo íntimo.

name: Zakuro
message: "No final da peça, ele viajou para o Mundo Lunar, mas pergunto-me por qual razão não fala-se de sua vida na Lua."

name: Zakuro
message: "O Mundo Lunar não era tão maravilhoso quanto ele esperava?"

name: Yuki
message: "Quem sabe? Ninguém além do próprio Cyrano saberia isso."
Isso provavelmente foi do quinto ou sexto ato.
"Em breve chegarei à Lua. Esta noite, sozinho, sem a ajuda de nenhum projétil!"
"Eu lhe digo, está lá... Lá, é para onde me enviam para o meu Paraíso..."
Ela estava citando a última cena de Cyrano de Bergerac.

name: Yuki
message: "Que tal isso? Você quer ler?"
Eu estendi um livro para ela.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah? Isso... foi escrito por Cyrano de Bergerac."

name: Yuki
message: "É o que o verdadeiro Cyrano escreveu sobre sua viagem à Lua."

name: Zakuro
message: "Então ele realmente escreveu sobre isso..."
Na peça, ele nunca foi mostrado escrevendo nenhuma história.
Mas, na realidade, Cyrano escreveu alguns dos primeiros romances de ficção científica.
Você pode encontrá-los hoje nos livros O Outro Mundo: Os Estados e Impérios da Lua e Os Estados e Impérios do Sol.
Nesse sentido, foi muito legal que Rostand tenha escrito sobre Cyrano viajando para a lua no final da peça.

name: Zakuro
message: "Obrigada. Fico honrada por você me emprestar outro."

name: Yuki
message: "Hã? Outro?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, esqueça...
Não é nada. Ahaha."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, a aula já acabou.
Bem, então vou me retirando."

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, certo... Até depois."
Ela levantou-se, fez uma reverência educada e saiu.
Ela disse que eu lhe emprestei "outro"...
Por que ela diria isso "outro" quando essa foi a primeira vez que lhe emprestei um livro?

name: Yuki
message: "Eu realmente não a entendo."
Talvez ela fosse realmente do tipo "garota misteriosa".
Aparentemente, eu não era muito bom em lidar com ela.
Assim que ela saiu, outros dois estudantes subiram ao telhado.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh? It's the Wakatsuki sisters."

name: Kagami
message: "Who was that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Her? Her name is Takashima-san. She apparently came up here because she thought the sky was beautiful."

name: Kagami
message: "Because the sky was beautiful, huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. I saw her on the rooftop of an apartment building the other day, so I guess she really likes the sky."

name: Kagami
message: "Hmm... For someone who forgets even me, her childhood friend, you sure seem to remember her really well."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. Don't say that, Onee-chan. Though it is pretty unusual for Yuki to remember a stranger."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, it's also unusual for you two to come up to the roof. Something wrong?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Um, well, it seems like Onee-chan has some business with you, and I came with her... Something like that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami has business with me... And because of that, you thought you needed to come all the way up here too, huh? So, what kind of business, exactly?"

name: Kagami
message: "Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Yes?"

name: Kagami
message: "What's with that look?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, you know, I have to keep my guard up..."

name: Kagami
message: "Right. Your guard, huh?
Is there any particular reason you need to keep your guard up around me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, every other time you've had 'business' with me, it's never ended well."

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, is that a fact?
F-Fine, then. I'm leaving...
We're leaving! Tsukasa!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ah, wait, Onee-chan!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Y-Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Apologize to her! That was all your fault!"

name: Yuki
message: "What did I do?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Everything!"

name: Yuki
message: "Okay. I'm sorry."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Not to me, to her!"

name: Yuki
message: "But she tends to flip out whenever she has 'business' with me."

name: Kagami
message: "Of course! That's because you always do stuff to tick me off!"

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa. She heard that from like a mile away."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Haa... Why is it like this with you two?"

name: Kagami
message: "Because she's the worst!"

name: Yuki
message: "Because you always get mad so quickly..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahhhh, that's enough! No more fighting, you two! I forbid it! Jeez!"
Tsukasa dragged Kagami back.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Okay, first: Yuki, apologize to her!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Don't 'huh' me! Now, apologize!"

name: Yuki
message: "Why should I?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yukiii..."

name: Yuki
message: "O-Okay... Sorry."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Put a little more heart into it!"
Man, Tsukasa sure could be scary.
She's usually so calm and polite. I wonder why she flips her switch like this sometimes.

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, okay. Um... Kagami, I'm sorry for acting weird around you before."

name: Kagami
message: "I-I'm not going to forgive you with just that."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan!"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? O-
Okay..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Forgive her!"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? Um..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki was kind enough to apologize, so you have to apologize too!"

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-Why do I have to?!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan..."

name: Kagami
message: "Ah, okay. Um...
you're forgiven."

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's not how you forgive someone. Do it right!"

name: Kagami
message: "Ah, okay... Sorry for getting mad."

name: Yuki
message: "Sorry."

name: Kagami
message: "Me too. Um..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Okay, now you've made up."

name: Kagami
message: "Hmph! Th-There's no reason for us to make up. It's not like we were fighting."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Jeez, not again..."

name: Kagami
message: "Sorry. I don't mean to get mad at you all the time like this. Does it really seem like I'm always mad at you?

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Well... n-not really."

name: Kagami
message: "I'll try to work on it."

name: Yuki
message: "O-Okay..."
What happened to Kagami?
She was always angry about something or other, but for some reason she was pretty honest today. Though she still seemed angry.

name: Yuki
message: "So? What business did you have with me?"

name: Kagami
message: "It's... It's not like I have any business with the likes of you. I just came to the rooftop for a change of pace, that's all."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Jeez, Onee-chan!"

name: Kagami
message: "Ahh! Sorry...
Um... Yeah, I do have business with you."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay. What is it?"

name: Kagami
message: "W-Well, it's kind of hard to say it now!"

name: Yuki
message: "Right."

name: Kagami
message: "Don't
'right' me! How can you always be so calm?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm... It's really strange how you're always mad at me, every single time I see you."

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? D-Did I get mad again?"

name: Yuki
message: "J-Just a little."

name: Kagami
message: "Um... well..."

name: Kagami
message: "Now I understand..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Understand what?"

name: Kagami
message: "I understand that it is your fault!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Why?"

name: Kagami
message: "I-It's the way you never care about anything except teasing people that makes me mad!"

name: Kagami
message: "You're the most selfish person on the planet!"

name: Yuki
message: "That's one harsh judgment. Don't tell me you came all the way here just to tell me that."

name: Kagami
message: "I did! That was my plan all along. Let's go, Tsukasa!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "No way!"

name: Kagami
message: "Owww!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Haa... You know..."

name: Kagami
message: "Ugh, yeah..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You said you could do it."

name: Kagami
message: "Yes... I did."

name: Tsukasa
message: "And you aren't doing it!"

name: Kagami
message: "I'm not doing it..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's no good!"

name: Kagami
message: "I know..."
Oh? What's this now? Why is Tsukasa acting like the older sister? Wouldn't that be a reversal of their usual roles?
Is it that kind of "day"?

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, Kagami, you're no good."

name: Kagami
message: "What'd you say?!"

name: Yuki
message: "That hurt..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You too, Yuki. You can't do that!"

name: Yuki
message: "Wait. I did something wrong?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Of course! Jeez, what do you two really want to do?! Especially you, Kagami! If you can't do it, then say so from the beginning!"
O-Of course I can do it!
You don't trust me?!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well, I'd like to, but can you really do it?"

name: Kagami
message: "I-I can...
Yeah."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You said you'd go through with it."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Come on. You're not chickening out now, are you?"

name: Kagami
message: "Ch-Chickening out?!
Of course not."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Good. I'll be waiting right outside.
Let me know once you've finished the job, okay?"

name: Kagami
message: "What? Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Later, Yuki."
Tsukasa waved and went back inside.

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa left. Aren't you going to go with her?"

name: Kagami
message: "Ts-Tsukasa..."
Wait. Why was Kagami all nervous?
Kagami wasn't saying a word. She was just staring at me. Just staring at me, very intently.

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Um... what is it?"

name: Kagami
message: "G-Guess I have no choice. I was the one who said I could do it myself."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay..."

name: Kagami
message: "Well, whatever..."

name: Kagami
message: "Uh... Hey, Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "Y-Yes?"
Kagami was still glaring at me. Is she angry or something?
She must be angry. I mean, her face just got all red.
I'd never seen this kind of expression before.
What?
Why?
I had no idea why, but...
Something was up with her today.
And Tsukasa was acting a bit strange, too.
Actually, she had her hands behind her back this whole time. Is she holding something?
She was awkwardly hiding something behind her back.
What is she holding?
Wait, why did Tsukasa leave?!

name: Tsukasa
message: "I'd like to, but can you really do it?"

name: Kagami
message: "I-I can... Really."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You said you'd go through with it."
Wait, hold on. Go through with... what?
Go through with it... Go through with it...
Oh, and not only that.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Come on. You're not chickening out now, are you?"

name: Kagami
message: "Ch-Chickening out?! Of course not."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Good. I'll be waiting right outside. Let me know once you've finished the job, okay?"

name: Kagami
message: "What? Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Later... Yuki..."
Finished the job?
What job?
In other words...
Do it → Do her in.
In other words...

name: Tsukasa
message: "You said you'd do her in."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Later, Yuki... Goodbye, forever."
No way!
Was she really trying to kill me?
Why?
So what Kagami had been hiding behind her back was certainly...
A w-weapon?!

name: Kagami
message: "U-Um... first of all, sh-show some gratitude."
For some reason, she looked down. Maybe she didn't want me to see the intent in her eyes?

name: Yuki
message: "U-Um, so... uh, Kagami..."

name: Kagami
message: "U-Um... this took a lot of time to prepare... and I had to do it in a way no one would notice..."

name: Yuki
message: "I-In a way no one would notice?!"
Wait... Did she mean it would be a perfect crime?

name: Yuki
message: "U-Um... wh-what are you going to do to me?"

name: Kagami
message: "Y-You'll find out later. F-First of all, be grateful,
for what I did for you."
Huh? Gratitude?
Why the hell would I be grateful about someone trying to murder me?

name: Yuki
message: "W-Were you really that mad, Kagami?"

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-Why would I be mad? I'm not. I'm calm. Extremely calm, in fact."
Calmly executing the perfect crime?

name: Yuki
message: "U-Um... Kagami-san? Don't be so rash... please..."

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? What're you talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, about killing me..."

name: Kagami
message: "K-Killing you? Who is?"
I timidly pointed at her.

name: Kagami
message: "Huh?!"

name: Kagami
message: "Why did you assume I was going to kill you?!"

name: Yuki
message: "That hurt."
Surely, sure her readiness to use violence at every opportunity is what lead to this kind of misunderstanding.

name: Yuki
message: "You're not going to?"

name: Kagami
message: "Of course not!"

name: Kagami
message: "Jeez. Every time you miss a test, don't I always get the handouts from the teacher, tell you what'll be on the test, and show you my notes?!"

name: Kagami
message: "I always help you out."
Oh, right. Once I thought about it, I realized that not even Kagami would be stupid enough to kill me in broad daylight.
Then what could it be?

name: Kagami
message: "S-So first, be grateful."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh... Well, thank―"
Right as I said that, I suddenly came to a realization.
The true nature of what she was hiding.
"Don't I do stuff like show you my notes?!"
The thing that Kagami was making such a big deal out of giving to me.
Maybe a straight A student like her might think it was something to be thankful for, but it certainly wasn't something I would be grateful for.
It was all just notes and handouts she got for me while I was skipping, right?

name: Yuki
message: "So I'm guessing you've got a whole range of materials back there?"

name: Kagami
message: "Well, um, I guess that's one way to put it."

name: Yuki
message: "Pretty heavy too?"

name: Kagami
message: "Well, kind of."

name: Yuki
message: "So it is heavy..."

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-What's your problem?! Be grateful for what you're getting!"

name: Yuki
message: "No thanks. I'll pass."

name: Kagami
message: "What? Why?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I mean, you've got a heavy package with a wide range of materials. Sounds like a pretty jam-packed course to me."

name: Kagami
message: "O-Of course it's jam-packed. I think I covered just about everything."

name: Yuki
message: "Jam-packed... Ugh."

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-What the hell's with that 'ugh'?! Why do you look disgusted?! Isn't it a good thing there's a lot of it?!"

name: Yuki
message: "You're the only one who would think that's a good thing. Anyway, I'll pass."
I spun around and headed toward the fence.

name: Kagami
message: "Huh?! What?! Wait a minute!"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't want it."
I heard Kagami hurrying after me.

name: Kagami
message: "I said wait! Anyway, just take it! It's yours!"

name: Yuki
message: "No thanks."

name: Kagami
message: "What?! O-Oh, right! I-It'll be good for you!"

name: Yuki
message: "Uh-huh..."
I suppose she meant good for my brain.

name: Kagami
message: "It should be nutritious!"
Nutritious, huh?

name: Kagami
message: "You won't know until you try."
That was weird.
Usually Kagami would've already given up by now. I didn't see why she was so desperate just to give me stuff like notes and handouts.
Before, she was all, "I'll leave it in my desk, so make sure to get it. If you don't, you better know I'll bring it right to your house," and left it at that.
Maybe I should just take it to shut her up.
That's what I thought anyway, but then...
For some reason, Kagami's eyes looked unusually fierce.
Crap. She was like a rabbit looking at a carrot. It was like she would dig in and try to make a meal out of me if I got too close.
Right after I accepted it, she'd go and misunderstand that it meant I intended to study, and then force me to go to a study group after class, and then before class, and again after class.
That would be an endless hell, repeating over and over.
Oh no. I was careless there for a minute. I couldn't let myself get caught in a hell like that.

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... Kagami-san."
For now, I needed to decline her invitation to hell in a polite and courteous manner.

name: Kagami
message: "What?"

name: Yuki
message: "A man once said, 'Just as eating contrary to the inclination is injurious to the health, so study without desire spoils the memory, and it retains nothing that it takes in.'"

name: Kagami
message: "Uh, so I take it you're not hungry?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? No, I mean, it'll spoil my memory."
Well, I was kind of hungry.

name: Kagami
message: "Okay. Well, I guess it's no use if you're not hungry."

name: Yuki
message: "Ah."

name: Kagami
message: "Wait, what was that just now?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, nothing at all..."

name: Kagami
message: "You are hungry!"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, kind of."

name: Kagami
message: "Then why won't you take it?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, like I said, it'll only spoil my memory. So basically, it's injurious."

name: Kagami
message: "Injurious?! You're hungry, yet you dare call it injurious?!"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right."
It seemed weird that she said something about me being hungry, but she must've been influenced by my previous statement.

name: Kagami
message: "Grr!
You dummy! I'll never make anything for you again!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oww!"
Kagami threw her hidden object at my face.

name: Kagami
message: "Actually, I shouldn't have woken up early to make this for you in the first place! I'm the dummy!"
She ran to leave the rooftop.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Whoa! Where are you going, Onee-chan?!"
Tsukasa stopped waiting by the door and ran down the stairs after Kagami.

name: Yuki
message: "Oww... I told her I didn't want it, but she shoved it on me anyway."
I picked up the object wrapped in a cloth.
A cloth? It wasn't big enough to be a notebook, though it was pretty heavy.

name: Yuki
message: "This feels like a... No, there's no way it could be a lunchbox!"
I had a bad feeling, yet I opened it, and...

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, okay. So notebooks come in the shape of lunchboxes now."
Oops. I fled from reality there for a second.
I opened the lid.

name: Yuki
message: "Lots of it. Jam-packed. Nutritious. Now I get it."

name: Yuki
message: "But wait a sec! It's Kagami-san we're talking about here! She's always just given me notes and handouts, so why a lunchbox?! I still have absolutely no clue as to why she gave me a lunchbox!"

From what I knew of her, she'd always been all "Quit skipping!" and "Study more!" and "Get your shit together!" She was always overly serious and would randomly kick and punch me over stuff like that.
So why would she give me a lunchbox?

name: Yuki
message: "Oh! Could it be something dangerous in disguise?!"
I put my ear up to it to listen closely, but...

name: Yuki
message: "I can't hear the sound of a timer. Doesn't seem like it will explode."

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... I have no idea why, but apparently Kagami brought me a lunchbox. And she even mentioned she made it for me or something."
Her eyes flared up just over whether or not I'd accept it.
I could tell from the look in her eyes and the contents of the lunchbox just how much effort she'd put into making this. Though it was in disarray after she threw it at me.

name: Yuki
message: "I guess I messed up. I need to do the right thing and apologize to her."
I didn't have the slightest clue as to why she'd make me lunch out of nowhere.
We'd been friends for as long as I can remember, but I couldn't recall her ever doing this.
I don't think she ever did that before. What a turn of events.
I went to apologize to her as I thought about it.
She was in a bad mood throughout, but I somehow got her to forgive me.
Did she really forgive me?
I think she did, at least.

name: Kagami
message: "Whatever!"
That was apparently the verdict.
That meant she forgave me, right?
Guess not... Sorry.
As I was hanging around in front of the station, I spotted a familiar face.
I'd sure been running into her a lot today.
Though it looked like she hadn't noticed me yet.
Usually I'd just ignore her and go back to doing my thing, but...

name: Yuki
message: "Oh? She's going inside that apartment building from the other day again."
Takashima-san vanished inside the apartment building where I saw her before.
The place she was going had to be...

name: Yuki
message: "Could it be that... Takashima-san lives in that apartment building?"
I had a lot of time to kill, so I succumbed to my curiosity and followed her.
The elevator started moving as soon as I set foot inside the apartment complex.
The blinking numbers above it indicated that she was headed for the rooftop.

name: Yuki
message: "She's going to the rooftop again? Maybe she doesn't live here after all."
When the elevator came back down, I headed in and pressed the button to take me to the rooftop.
This was where she was hanging out the other day.
There she was, standing in that spot as if it were the most natural thing in the world.

name: Yuki
message: "I thought you'd be here. What are you doing up here?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Good evening, Minakami-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, good evening."

name: Zakuro
message: "Same to you. What brings you here?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I happened to see you come this way. I was a bit worried considering what happened the other day, so I ended up following you."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, so you were worried."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, sorry if I disturbed you. I can go if you want."

name: Zakuro
message: "That isn't true at all. By all means, feel free to keep me company."

name: Yuki
message: "You sure?"
The same stuffed doll I'd seen yesterday was lying by her feet.

name: Yuki
message: "Were you going to drop that off the roof again?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh... Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "Do you not like that doll or something?"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's not it. In fact... I love it. It's very precious to me."

name: Yuki
message: "And yet you drop it from the rooftop?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. This is something I have to do."

name: Yuki
message: "You have to? What's up with that?"
After giving a half-hearted reply, she looked upward.

name: Yuki
message: "Is there some reason why you have to drop it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Because of... the sky, perhaps."

name: Yuki
message: "The sky?"
Indeed, the sky was spread wide before her.
It wasn't like there were people up there, and there didn't seem to be any birds either. Up there in the sky were only the stars and the darkness of the night.
Takashima-san nodded yes to my question.

name: Yuki
message: "So what does the sky have to do with it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm searching for a place in the sky. That's what I mean."

name: Yuki
message: "Searching for a place in the sky?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. What do you think, Minakami-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "About what?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The beginning and end of the sky."

name: Yuki
message: "The beginning and end of the sky?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, it doesn't really have either one, does it? It doesn't really matter where it begins or ends."

name: Zakuro
message: "I see. I think you're right."

name: Zakuro
message: "Still, despite that, I have to search."

name: Yuki
message: "You still have to search?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. The place where it ends, and the place where it begins. I have to search for them."

name: Yuki
message: "Um... Is that what you're doing here? That means you've been searching for these places in the sky?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, so, are you like, one of those..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Those what?"

name: Yuki
message: "One of those people who sell jars full of, like, water that's blessed by the church founder. Are you involved in stuff like that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No. There's nothing religious about it. What I'm doing isn't related to religion in the first place."

name: Yuki
message: "R-Really? Then is it some sort of metaphor?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It isn't a metaphor either."

name: Yuki
message: "S-So then..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Aerodynamics."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
What? Was she, like, researching aerodynamics by dropping these dolls?
What could you figure out by dropping dolls off a building?
Nothing, right?

name: Zakuro
message: "The city we can see from here is overflowing with words. The words of many different people."

name: Yuki
message: "Uh-huh... Well, yeah, there are lots of people there."

name: Zakuro
message: "But the sky isn't overflowing with words. There are no words in this sky."

name: Yuki
message: "No words..."
I couldn't tell if it was some kind of metaphor, or if she was serious.

name: Zakuro
message: "In this world, there is a lone girl."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay... A lone girl?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, in this world there is one singular girl. No, there is a girl who is the world itself."

name: Yuki
message: "A girl who is the world itself?"

name: Zakuro
message: "There's only one girl. And she must be the only one, because she is the world itself. And more importantly..."

name: Yuki
message: "More importantly?"

name: Zakuro
message: "That girl cannot be here."

name: Yuki
message: "Hold on. Isn't that weird? That she can't be here when she's the world itself..."

name: Yuki
message: "I don't understand what you're trying to say. The world itself cannot be in the world?"

name: Zakuro
message: "You don't understand?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The girl who is the world itself should never have been in this world in the first place. That's all I mean to say."
So she whispered as she gazed at the stars.

name: Zakuro
message: "The triangle that shines in the summer sky is much larger in person than I had imagined."

name: Zakuro
message: "It's a triangle so large that it even encompasses the Milky Way."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, does this have anything to do with what you said earlier?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The fact that an infinite line is a triangle."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? What?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Are you not familiar with it?"
No. Actually, I did know that.
I'd heard about it. Well, read about it. I was pretty sure the title of the book was Of Learned Ignorance, and the author was...

name: Zakuro
message: "Nicholas Cusanus."

name: Yuki
message: "Right, the theologian. I'm surprised you know about him. You must be into stuff like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Since a line and a triangle differ incomparably, the imagination, which does not transcend the genus of perceptible things, does not apprehend that the former can be the latter."

name: Yuki
message: "That theologian's book is often considered the start of modern philosophy. 'A triangle is a circle and a sphere.' In other words, a triangle is all shapes, and all of them can be infinite."

name: Yuki
message: "Though he tried to use that to prove the Holy Trinity."

name: Zakuro
message: "Don't you agree it's a strained interpretation?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "What he proved had nothing to do with God. The Trinity is completely unrelated to the triangle."

name: Yuki
message: "Err, why do you assume that's what I think?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Am I wrong?"
She wasn't wrong. I remembered thinking that as I read his book. But how did she...

name: Yuki
message: "Um, why do you know about all that stuff? Wait, more importantly... why are you acting like you know what I'm thinking?"

name: Zakuro
message: "You think I'm acting like I know?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, it's common sense that you can't read someone else's mind, you know?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I can't read someone else's mind... Is that right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, how should I put it. You can't share another person's memories, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No, I can."

name: Yuki
message: "How?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Because the girl is the world itself."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
Err... just what is she saying?
Maybe she really is one of those unstable people.
Claiming to be the world itself... Is she talking about that anime? Suzumiya something-or-other...

name: Zakuro
message: "The girl who is the world itself shouldn't be in the world. She should return to the girl who's waiting in the sky."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, just to clarify... who's waiting in the sky?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The girl she must protect. The girl she swore to protect. She's somewhere in this sky."

name: Zakuro
message: "The girl who is the world itself must return to the girl in the sky."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, this girl who's the world itself is searching for the girl in the sky?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "Is that the reason you were dropping stuffed dolls?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."
Takashima-san approached the fence carrying two stuffed dolls.
She held the dolls out toward the sky.

name: Zakuro
message: "The girl who is the world itself is right here. So answer my call, you who sprouts wings."
The girl who sprouts wings... Is she like an angel or something?
Pretty sure there was an anime like that. Or was it a game?
There is a girl who sprouts wings. She is waiting in the air...
Well, I don't know a whole lot about anime.

name: Zakuro
message: "To the infinite triangle, shining in the sky. You, whose vastness engulfs even the galaxy itself. Please listen to the girl's words."
As she murmured that, she threw the doll.
The doll hovered in the air for just the slightest moment... then descended... and fell to the ground.
Of course...

name: Zakuro
message: "It fell."

name: Yuki
message: "Is that the same thing you did last time?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It looked similar, but it was different."
For some reason, she looked a little sad as she said that.
She picked up the next doll and held it out to the sky.

name: Zakuro
message: "Three stars. Three spirits. A triangle is a circle, a sphere, and finally an infinite line."

name: Zakuro
message: "An infinite line is the absolute. Everything is one, and one is everything. Please guide that spirit."
The next doll floated... and then fell straight down.

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa... It fell."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, you've heard of physics, right? You know, in this world, we have this thing called gravity."

name: Zakuro
message: "The aerodynamics pioneer... A small Eiffel stands underneath that tower."

name: Yuki
message: "The hell?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It's a charm of aerodynamics."

name: Yuki
message: "Aerodynamics... Um, that's kind of like fluid dynamics, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Not exactly. Aerodynamics is more of a psychological type of dynamics."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha... A psychological type of dynamics, is it?"
She was definitely talking about some occult stuff, right?
She headed downstairs to go fetch the dolls.
I hesitated for a second to go along with her, but my curiosity won out, and I ended up following her.
Takashima-san was brushing the dirt off the dolls.

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, can I ask you something?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "If the girl who is the world itself were to disappear from the world, then what would happen to the world?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The world would be reborn."

name: Yuki
message: "O-Oh, really..."
Her explanation just kept getting more and more suspicious.

name: Yuki
message: "Is it, like, you're dropping the dolls because the world's form isn't correct, and you want to return it to its correct form?"

name: Zakuro
message: "What gave you that impression?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, well, there's the whole freedom of religion thing, so it's cool if you believe all that, but..."

name: Zakuro
message: "But? What's wrong?"

name: Yuki
message: "You should stop climbing over the fence and dropping dolls off. It's dangerous, and people will think you're crazy."

name: Zakuro
message: "I see. Still, if something like that did happen, it would just be the fate the world had decided for me. It would be the will of the girl who is the world itself."
Damn... The only thing I got from that mess was the fact that I had no idea what the hell she was saying!

name: Yuki
message: "Um, I get the part about not wanting the world to be filled with injustice, and about wanting to change it, but..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? What are you talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, well, I thought that you were doing all this to fix the evils of the world."

name: Zakuro
message: "No, it isn't about good or evil. It's just something I must do."
Whoa... She was clearly a full-blown religious nut.

name: Yuki
message: "So what needs to be done for the world girl to be able to return to the girl of the sky?"

name: Zakuro
message: "World girl..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? What about it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, I just thought it had a cool ring to it."
What the hell?!

name: Zakuro
message: "The moment the Summer Triangle becomes visible..."

name: Yuki
message: "It's July right now, so the Summer Triangle stays out for quite a while."

name: Zakuro
message: "Today's the 13th, so it'll rise in the east when the sun goes down, and then it will vanish into the west at dawn."

name: Yuki
message: "Do you know the exact time it comes out?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't. That's why I'm trying different times."

name: Yuki
message: "I see..."

name: Yuki
message: "So it has to be on a day when there's a clear view of the stars, then."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's true."

name: Yuki
message: "By the way, why are you using this apartment rooftop anyway?"
there were plenty of other tall buildings.

name: Zakuro
message: "It's easy to get into this one, and there aren't many buildings around that would obstruct the view."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh. So if you can get in, then pretty much anywhere will do."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, as long as you can see the stars well."

name: Yuki
message: "Cool."

name: Yuki
message: "Also, why are you dropping these stuffed dolls?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Anything that looks humanoid would work, but it's more dangerous to drop normal dolls or mannequins."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, that makes sense. Stuffed dolls are better because they're soft."
The clearer the view of the sky, the easier it was to spot the Summer Triangle.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh yeah, it's almost summer break, huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "There's about a week left, though."

name: Yuki
message: "This sky searching seems kinda like early summer homework, doesn't it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah..."
I wondered why I felt like that. Usually, I'd want to get away from such a crazy person as quickly as possible.
And yet my mouth seemed compelled to respond.

name: Yuki
message: "I guess I'll help you search for it. That place where the world girl meets the girl of the sky or whatever."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Okay!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you very much."
Takashima-san bowed deeply.
She didn't need to be so thankful... was what I thought, but I was still a little unsure why I'd blurted that out in the first place.
But spending a summer night with her, gazing at the stars, looking for the "world girl" and the "girl of the sky" she talked about, actually seemed... kind of fun.
Despite knowing full well nothing like that existed, I couldn't help but think it might be fun.
Then we headed home.
For some reason, Takashima-san and I never parted ways. She followed behind me silently.
Maybe she was following me to make sure I didn't tell anyone about what happened earlier.
Though it wasn't the easiest topic to bring up in conversation.

name: Yuki
message: "So, Takashima-san..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes?"

name: Yuki
message: "I won't tell anyone about this."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "I mean, about what you told me."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, I don't really mind if you tell anyone about it. I don't think anyone would believe such a ridiculous story."

name: Yuki
message: "O-Okay..."
At least she was aware that what she'd said was weird.
But I wondered why she'd told me.

name: Yuki
message: "Why did you tell me about all that, then?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Anything the girl who is the world itself desires will come true, so it was inevitable that I would tell you."
Whoa... What a weirdo...
We were still talking when we reached my house.
For some reason, Zakuro just stood in front of my house. Maybe she was hoping I would invite her in?

name: Yuki
message: "Um... you wanna come in for a little bit?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, please."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you want to drink? Is tea fine?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, yes. Thank you very much."
I fetched the plastic bottle with tea from the fridge and poured it into two nearby cups.

name: Yuki
message: "Here you go."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, thank you. Sorry about all this."

name: Yuki
message: "No problem."
The two of us sat down and started having tea.

name: Yuki
message: "Anyway, it's pretty late. Don't you think your parents are worried?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Are you talking about me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I'm not sure who else I'd be talking about."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, in that case, there's no problem. I have no parents in this world."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
"In this world"... That means...

name: Yuki
message: "U-Um, I guess I said something I shouldn't have. Sorry."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, don't worry about it."

name: Yuki
message: "What happened to your parents? Did they get in an accident or something?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It wasn't an accident... but I can't see them right now."

name: Yuki
message: "O-Oh, really?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. They live in the countryside."
Huh?!

name: Yuki
message: "Wait, that's what you meant?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."
I'd misunderstood her because she said "in this world." In her case, it was actually more like "in this town." She really was a weird girl.

name: Yuki
message: "Well, either way, you still need to get back, right?"
She took a deep breath and stared at me with a serious look on her face.

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm fully aware that I shall only be a disturbance, but could you please let me stay here until she returns to the sky?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Of course, I don't intend on being a leech. I'll do my best to serve you and take care of all of your everyday necessities, such as cooking, cleaning, and laundry."

name: Yuki
message: "Serve me?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Please feel free to call me your maid, housekeeper, or anything you want from now on, Yuki-sama."

name: Yuki
message: "Yuki-sama?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. May I call you that?"
From the look on her face, it didn't seem like she was joking.
H-How was I supposed to deal with a situation like this?

name: Zakuro
message: "Since it's an abrupt request, how about a trial period?"

name: Yuki
message: "A trial period?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. If my service is to your liking, we can live together. If not, I shall leave immediately. Would that be acceptable?"

name: Yuki
message: "Okay..."
Hmm. I didn't really mind, but...
I had room for at least one person to stay, and she did say she'd do housework and stuff. Though I didn't really mind doing housework anyway.
It might be more efficient to live together while searching for the place to return to the sky... And I was starting to like her a bit more anyway.

name: Zakuro
message: "Nnh."

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa! Wh-Why are you suddenly rolling up your skirt?!"
Takashima-san was baring her soft, pale thighs!

name: Zakuro
message: "Well, I thought I'd get started on the bath. I'll be cleaning the tub a little, and I need to tie my skirt up so it won't get in the way."

name: Yuki
message: "O-Oh... Okay."

name: Zakuro
message: "It's hard to do with a long skirt."

name: Yuki
message: "W-Well, yeah... I suppose it would be."
What was I doing?
Each time Takashima-san's thighs showed from beneath her rolled-up skirt, I ended up stealing a glance.

name: Yuki
message: "The fuck is wrong with me?!"
This made no sense. I mean, I'm a girl, not a guy, so why was I peeking at her thighs?

name: Zakuro
message: "This is a pain. Maybe I should just take it off."
She put her hand on the zipper.

name: Yuki
message: "What?! Y-You're taking it off?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, yes. Should I not?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ah... Huh?"
Well, we were both girls, so it wasn't like it really mattered.
Or so I thought.

name: Zakuro
message: "Here we go."
She started to unzip her skirt.
I could see her underwear!

name: Yuki
message: "Err, wait."
"What the hell is going on here?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Uwaaah!"
I jumped in surprise when I suddenly heard an angry voice behind me.
I turned in the direction of the angry roar and saw Kagami towering over me.

name: Yuki
message: "Y-You came in through the window again?"

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's because you were making so much noise in the middle of the night!"

name: Yuki
message: "It's not really the middle of the night."

name: Kagami
message: "You only think that because of your unhealthy lifestyle! This is the middle of the night for normal people!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, Kagami-san. Good evening."
Takashima-san quickly bowed her head.

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, you too. Good evening."
Kagami bowed her head as well.

name: Kagami
message: "Actually, wait a minute! What is she doing here?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? Yes. I am serving my master."

name: Kagami
message: "Serving your master?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."

name: Kagami
message: "Why would you do that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It's our sealed fate."

name: Kagami
message: "Sealed... fate?"

name: Kagami
message: "Say, Yuki..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? What do I have to do with this?"
I could almost hear the cheap thunder SFX playing in the background.

name: Kagami
message: "What... What is this all about?"

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, why are you so angry? F-For the record, we're both girls."

name: Kagami
message: "Even if you are both girls, what's this about sealed fate? And serving? There's more to this story, isn't there?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, if you want to play it that way, it's also pretty strange how you're getting so upset over something like this."

name: Yuki
message: "Agh."
Kagami swung her fist downward with enough force to break a desk in two.

name: Kagami
message: "I-It is not! I'm your childhood friend! Besides, Tsukasa and I were asked to look out for you while your parents are away!"

name: Yuki
message: "R-Really?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yes, that's right. We were definitely told to look after you."

name: Yuki
message: "Err, Tsukasa?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "It sounded kind of loud over here, so we came by."

name: Yuki
message: "So they really did tell you to look after me?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Anyway, may we please return to the previous topic?"

name: Kagami
message: "What topic?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The one we were talking about before."

name: Tsukasa
message: "And what was that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Anyway... First, I shall not allow you to exercise violence against Yuki-sama."

name: Kagami
message: "H-Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Right. I am Yuki-sama's housekeeper. A housekeeper is someone who protects the house. In other words, I am one who protects the owner from intruders."

name: Kagami
message: "Intruders? Is that so?"
I felt a dangerous aura emanating from Kagami.

Not good. That was like adding oil to the fire, or maybe more like giving Love Plus to a wizard. In other words, it was like an eternally broiling heart. Err, that wasn't quite right either. It was more like a heart burning with moe.
No, that's all irrelevant! This isn't the time to be making bad jokes!

name: Kagami
message: "Takashima-san, are you trying to tell me I'm an intruder?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."

name: Kagami
message: "Wha-!"

name: Zakuro
message: "At the very least, I can't think of someone who ignores Yuki-sama's explanation and resorts straight to violence as anything other than an enemy. No, not just an enemy. It shows there's something wrong with you as a human being."

name: Kagami
message: "Ugh... A-As a human being..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I think it's best to listen to what someone has to say before judging them. Am I mistaken?"

name: Kagami
message: "F-Fine, then! I'll listen to her, all right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you very much."
Takashima-san gave a quick bow.
Wow, go Takashima-san! My maid sure made a good bodyguard.

name: Kagami
message: "A-Anyway, put your skirt back on."

name: Zakuro
message: "Understood."

name: Kagami
message: "You two are shacking up?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, it's more like 'living together.'"

name: Kagami
message: "Shacking up, living together, same difference!"

name: Yuki
message: "There's a big difference, actually..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well, I suppose this is what we call a difference of opinion?"

name: Yuki
message: "Why are you so mad, anyway?"

name: Kagami
message: "Isn't that obvious?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I wonder why."

name: Kagami
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Why are you being so rude just because I want to live here?"

name: Kagami
message: "I'm not being rude!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, okay. Well, in that case, why are you getting so mad over it?"

name: Kagami
message: "Uh, well, how do I put it..."

name: Yuki
message: "How do you put it?"

name: Kagami
message: "W-Well, it's because, uh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "It's not like I'm a guy. We're both female, so there's no problem, is there?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Why are you so upset about it?"

name: Kagami
message: "B-Because, um..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh. I've heard of something like this before."

name: Zakuro
message: "People see themselves in others. That's the first step to understanding others, but there are times when it can go too far."

name: Zakuro
message: "They especially think about what they want to do themselves, what they may do themselves."

name: Kagami
message: "Urgh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "So why does Kagami-san not want me to be alone with Yuki-sama even though we're both girls? The answer is..."

name: Kagami
message: "Wait! Wait! Shh!"

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's not it at all! I-I was just surprised because it was so sudden. It's not like I refused outright without giving her a chance to explain."
Actually, that's exactly what she did.

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, I understand. In addition to being allowed to live here, I intend to do a good job serving her."

name: Kagami
message: "I-I already know that. But it's still weird, even if you are both girls. And wait, won't your parents be worried too?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "There's no problem there. My parents aren't around anymore."
The way she said that was pretty misleading.
It'd be correct to say her parents weren't "in this city."
But after seeing her dismantle Kagami in a second flat, I decided that maybe it was better to just keep my mouth shut.
For the time being, I stood back and watched the scene unfold.

name: Zakuro
message: "I want to at least repay her kindness for saying she'd help me with something I want to accomplish."

name: Kagami
message: "Something you want to accomplish?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, she said she's looking for the place in the sky to return the world girl to the sky girl."

name: Kagami
message: "To return the world girl to the sky girl? Isn't that..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Do you know about that?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "It's a popular legend in this town. The girl of the world, from the ground, and the girl of the air, from the sky, meet just once every summer, in a place where you can see the Summer Triangle."

name: Yuki
message: "Wow... It's the first time I've heard about that."
Wait... That sounded a lot like the story of Tanabata. There's supposed to be one night every summer when Orihime and Hikoboshi are allowed to meet.

name: Kagami
message: "Though I don't know if it's an old legend or just something someone made up."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Maybe it's just a rumor around this city?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It's not a rumor. It's something that has been decided by the world."

name: Yuki
message: "So you mean it's a rumor spreading all over the world?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I don't think you could call it a rumor at that point."

name: Tsukasa
message: "But Tanabata is pretty close to the same thing. It originated in China, and festivals are held even in places like Taiwan, Vietnam, and South Korea."

name: Kagami
message: "But the date was originally determined according to Japan's lunisolar calendar, which would have placed it in August. The sky Takashima-san is looking for is in July, so I get the feeling they're different."

name: Yuki
message: "But Orihime's star is the magnitude 0 star Vega in the constellation Lyra, and Hikoboshi's star is the magnitude 1 star Altair in the constellation Aquila. That's two out of the three stars in the Summer Triangle."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You're right. In that case, we can't say the Tanabata legend is completely unrelated."

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe it's just a local variant of the Tanabata legend. If so, it's understandable that it would still be in July regardless of the calendar in use."

name: Kagami
message: "Either way, it's still not on July 7th like Tanabata. Isn't that strange?"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not sure, but..."

name: Kagami
message: "Either way, you two living together is just wrong!"

name: Zakuro
message: "That again?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's weird. Why are you stuck on that? I mean, we're both girls."

name: Kagami
message: "Shut up! What's weird is how you keep throwing around words like 'serve' and 'fate'!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Am I bothering you, Yuki-sama? I can leave if you wish."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, well, it'd honestly be nice having you clean and all, but searching the sky together is more like killing time for me. I feel bad making you do all that."

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't mind at all. It's up to you."

name: Kagami
message: "I don't know about all this housekeeping stuff, but if you do this, Takashima-san will always be with you when you eat, take a bath, and even while you sleep!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Of course. I'm her maid."

name: Kagami
message: "That's totally improper!"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't really think there's a problem. What about you, Tsukasa?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well, I don't see a problem with it."

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I mean, going by that logic, it'd be no problem if we wanted to stay here too, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "If it's fine that Takashima-san stays here because they're both girls, wouldn't it be fine if the two of us stayed here as well?"

name: Zakuro
message: "B-But I'm doing it to repay her."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well, we've been next door neighbors since forever, and we were asked to look after her."

name: Zakuro
message: "B-But..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Either way, the world will be changed by the presence of the world girl. Until then, we'll each carry out our respective roles, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "W-Well..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Everything in the world will go according to wishes of the girl who is the world itself. That's the legend, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yes. Maybe you're right. Okay, I understand."

name: Yuki
message: "Wait, what do you mean?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Um, to put it simply, if Takashima-san is going to play at being a maid and stay here, then there shouldn't be a problem with Onee-chan staying here as the concerned childhood friend."

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's what this conversation has been about? Actually, why is Tsukasa deciding all this?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh? You don't like my suggestion?"

name: Kagami
message: "I-I don't dislike it, but..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well, it's fine. Don't think about it too much."
I got the feeling something had just flown over my head. And I felt a little uneasy about how Tsukasa and Zakuro had come to an agreement so easily.
It sounded like they were talking nonsense just now. How were they able to hold a meaningful conversation when most of what they were talking about was gibberish?
It was a bit mysterious.

name: Zakuro
message: "So this means that Takashima Zakuro will now stay at Yuki-sama's place as a maid character, and the meddlesome childhood friend character has barged in after her, insisting on staying as well."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, in that case you can think of it like this. If there's a maid character and a childhood friend character, all you need to round out the roster is a little sister."

name: Tsukasa
message: "There might actually be just such a person around here. Though she's the type you'd have to go wake up in the morning instead of waiting for her to come wake you up. Oh, and she also comes with a hook: she's a twin. What do you think, Yuki?"

name: Yuki
message: "Wait, you're asking me?"
I thought I'd been completely excluded from the conversation.

name: Tsukasa
message: "So, what do you think of this plan?"

name: Yuki
message: "W-Well... It's not as if I really like that kind of game."

name: Yuki
message: "Plus, that setting only works in a game or light novel. I get the feeling that it would just cause problems in reality."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh. You may be right. Then the little sister will take her leave now."
Tsukasa's shoulders drooped dejectedly as she headed toward the door.

name: Yuki
message: "Now I kind of feel bad..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, so it's okay if I stay?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ugh... F-Fine, you all can do whatever you want."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yaaay!"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I hate when it gets too noisy, but I wouldn't mind if it was a bit livelier around the house."

name: Tsukasa
message: "This is great, Onee-chan! It'll be a sleepover!"

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... How did it turn out like this?"
After we finished eating the dinner that Takashima-san made, Kagami and Tsukasa went home to grab their things.

name: Zakuro
message: "Yuki-sama, the bath is ready."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, thanks."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, since she went through the trouble of preparing the bath for you, why don't you go get in?"

name: Yuki
message: "Sure."
I briskly headed toward the bathroom.

name: Zakuro
message: "Then I'll go too."

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? Wait, Takashima-san! Just where do you plan on going?"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's a silly question. I'm going to the bathroom to wash Yuki-sama's back."

name: Kagami
message: "Wha―?! W-Wait! Isn't that overdoing it?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I think Yuki-sama is the one who should decide that."

name: Kagami
message: "B-But that's..."

name: Kagami
message: "Hey, stop!"

name: Zakuro
message: "What is the matter, Kagami-san?"
When I went into the changing room, I saw Takashima completely naked.
Her nude body was so beautiful and flawless that it would have overwhelmed anyone's sense, regardless of their gender.

name: Kagami
message: "Whoa! Wait, y-you're not really going to go in like that, are you?"
Kagami reflexively turned her face away.

name: Zakuro
message: "I am. Is there a problem?"

name: Kagami
message: "Is there a problem? Of course there is! You can't do that! It's totally improper!"

name: Kagami
message: "Why are you so open with Yuki, anyway? Even between girls, you should have a little modesty."

name: Zakuro
message: "I should? What's embarrassing about people of the same sex bathing together? I'm pretty sure you're just overthinking it."

name: Kagami
message: "I-I don't know! A-Anyway, stop with the excuses! At least go put on a swimsuit."
Kagami grabbed Takashima's arm.

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't have a swimsuit."

name: Kagami
message: "Then I'm not letting you take one more step."

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa... Fine. I'll give up for today."
Brush, brush, brush...
Brush, brush, brush, brush, brush, brush...
The four of us stood in the cramped bathroom, brushing our teeth.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Wow, Takashima-san's is coffee-flavored."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, yes. Yours is strawberry-flavored, right?"

name: Kagami
message: "For her, it's strawberry or nothing."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ehehe, it's a bit embarrassing..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You're so mature, Takashima-san. Coffee's such a refined taste!"

name: Kagami
message: "No, it's immature to have flavored toothpaste in the first place"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Is it really... What about you, Yuki?

name: Yuki
message: "Hm? I use normal toothpaste. I don't know if it's herb or mint or whatever. What about it?"
The two of them compared my tube with Kagami's.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan, I'll use mint too."

name: Zakuro
message: "I will also use mint."

name: Kagami
message: "Y-You two..."

name: Zakuro
message: "May I lay the mattress here?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, sure. If everyone's going to sleep together, then here would be best."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yay! This is the best part of the sleepover!"
Tsukasa dived under the blankets.

name: Kagami
message: "Hey, that's bad manners."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ehehe. These blankets have the scent of Yuki's house. Sniff, sniff."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh really? Sniff, sniff."

name: Yuki
message: "Why would you sniff something like that?!"

name: Kagami
message: "Jeez. You two are getting a bit too excited."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Of course! We finally get to have a sleepover. It would be a waste to just go to sleep. We have to get all comfy under the blankets as we talk and play games and stuff!"

name: Kagami
message: "We can't. We have to wake up early, so we need to go right to sleep."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Really?"

name: Kagami
message: "Yes, really!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "You're not planning on going to sleep yet, are you, Yuki?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? I was thinking about reading a book first."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You can't read a book! If you have time to read a book, then let's play!"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, that's fine with me. So, what are we playing?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hm... How about a card game?"

name: Yuki
message: "Sure, why not?"

name: Kagami
message: "Hey, cut it out. Don't spoil Tsukasa like that."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You're no fun. You don't want to play with Yuki? You're fine with just sleeping together?"

name: Kagami
message: "Wha―! You're making it sound like I want to sleep with Yuki or something."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, you don't? In that case..."

name: Kagami
message: "Ahh! Wait, Takashima-san! Why are you pulling my blanket away?! Just how far do you plan on taking it?! Wait!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm thinking of having you sleep in the hallway, since you don't want to sleep with Yuki-sama."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Goodbye, Onee-chan!"

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I'll see you again once you decide to be honest."

name: Kagami
message: "F-Fine! Okay! I want to! I want to sleep with Yuki! And I also want to play! There! How's that?!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Very well."
Kagami's bed was put back.

name: Kagami
message: "Jeez. Why are you all picking on me?"

name: Yuki
message: "You do have it pretty rough, don't you?"

name: Kagami
message: "Whose fault do you think that is?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"
Why is she yelling at me?!

name: Kagami
message: "It's already plenty late, so let's go to bed, okay? You've had enough fun for one day."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Huh? Let's play some more!"

name: Kagami
message: "No way. You have school tomorrow. Please, just listen to me for once."

name: Tsukasa
message: "School should just disappear."

name: Yuki
message: "Amen!"

name: Kagami
message: "Come on!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yuki-sama, please go to bed first."

name: Yuki
message: "But what about you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm a maid, so I can't go to bed before my master. I'll go make sure all the doors are locked."

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, thanks."
Though I already did that.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, you're going to bed already?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, apparently Takashima-san can't until I do."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, okay. Well, I suppose you have to then."

name: Kagami
message: "Go to bed like a good little girl."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay... Night."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Good night."

name: Kagami
message: "Good night."
I got in bed and closed my eyes.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, are you asleep?"

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa, cut it out."

name: Tsukasa
message: "It's just for a second. Look at how cute her face looks when she's asleep."

name: Kagami
message: "She's not really that cute..."
I could feel two people staring at my face.

name: Kagami
message: "Haa... If only she would wash her mouth out with soap, and maybe learn some manners while she's at it."
That's none of your business... Damn, I really wanted to say that. Just because your grades are good doesn't mean you can punch and kick someone.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Pardon me!"
I could feel someone creeping into my bed.

name: Kagami
message: "W-Wait, Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You wanna come in too? It's really cozy."

name: Kagami
message: "N-No way. That's sick."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Back when we were little, the three of us slept in her bed when we watched scary movies, didn't we?"

name: Kagami
message: "W-Well, that's when we were really little. Now we're adults. You know, boys and girls aren't really conscious of each other at that age."

name: Tsukasa
message: "But we're not boys and girls. We're girls and girls."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah, t-true..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Let's get cozy together. Everything smells like Yuki in here."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah, the smell of a wet dog, right?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki's scent is so comforting. She's so tall now, but being wrapped up in her scent makes me feel like she hasn't changed since we were kids. Come on, it feels good."

name: Kagami
message: "I-If you insist, then I guess I have to... But just a little, okay."
I could sense someone crawling into the other side of the bed.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ehehe. Reporting live from the scene of Yuki's sleeping face."

name: Tsukasa
message: "This is Tsukasa speaking. Can you hear me, Onee-chan? Right now I'm closing in on Yuki's face."

name: Kagami
message: "U-Uh... Ts-Tsukasa-san, what does Yuki's sleeping face look like right now? Please inform me of the situation over there."
The big sister sure has a soft spot for her little sister.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ehehe. It's very cute. She looks like an angel."
Like an angel... That's like a parent talking about their child!

name: Kagami
message: "Angel? Oh, the fallen kind that throws bolts of lightning, right?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I wonder what Yuki's cheek feels like."
Poke, poke.
Whoa, that tickled a bit.
Poke, poke.
I felt a round fingertip poking me in the cheek.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh... This is pretty fun."

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, lemme try."
I felt a round fingertip poking my other cheek.
Poke, poke.
Poke, poke.

name: Kagami
message: "This is definitely a lot more fun than I thought it'd be."
They were taking turns poking my cheeks.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hehehe."

name: Kagami
message: "Hey, Tsukasa, try pressing there. I'll press here."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Roger."
Both of my cheeks were being poked at once.

name: Kagami
message: "Hah! Yuki's face looks funny."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Haha, you shouldn't laugh."

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, you two... I'm awake, you know?"

name: Kagami+Tsukasa
message: "Uwha?!"

name: Kagami
message: "I-If you're awake, then say so!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Sorry, Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez, don't play with my face."
Maybe you should start with an apology, Kagami.

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, Takashima-san, welcome back."
She'd just finished making sure the doors were locked and was now standing in front of us in blank amazement.

name: Zakuro
message: "Kagami-san, Tsukasa-san, what are you two doing in Yuki-sama's bed?"

name: Kagami
message: "U-Uh... just a sudden impulse."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. They were just teasing me a little."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I'm sure you two know what this looks like!
Zakuro's small shoulders trembled.

name: Zakuro
message: "...May I please join in?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
